name: Diabetic Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, egg, sugar substitute, and butter.
2. Add buttermilk and mix in flour, baking soda, apple, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, soda, cloves, and vanilla.
3. Drop batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
4. Bake for 7-8 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
